Meet Kubi

The brand expert behind
the world's biggest names

Since 1996, Kubi Springer has been building and growing brands for commercial success. Her name is synonymous with three words: She Builds Brands.

As Global Marketing Director at AVANTGARDE and host of the AURA Skypool Podcast — filmed atop the world's highest 360° infinity pool in Dubai — Kubi sits at the intersection of brand, culture, and commercial growth.

"Kubi Springer is one of the top five brand specialists in the UK." — Paola Lucktung, Adidas

Named Global Consultant of the Year. Best Marketing Book of the Year (British Book Awards). Former Harper's Bazaar contributor. Now every podcast conversation becomes a course you can buy.

NikeFendiBeyoncé L'OréalRolls RoyceFerrari Hugo BossPorscheCharlotte Tilbury Louis VuittonAston MartinLFW

The Book

The Blueprint That Started It All

Before the podcast. Before The Vault. Before 15 million views. There was a book — named Best Marketing Book of the Year at the British Book Awards — that changed how thousands of entrepreneurs think about their brand.

Every course in The Vault traces its DNA back to the frameworks in this book. Read it first. Go deeper in The Vault.

Kubi Springer is one of the top five brand specialists in the UK.

For Teams & Organisations

Brand Education at Scale

Equip your entire marketing team, leadership cohort, or organisation with Kubi's frameworks. Corporate licensing gives your team unlimited Vault access, live workshops, and bespoke content.

01

Team Access Licence

Full Vault access for your entire team. All 40+ courses, new drops included. One annual licence, zero per-seat friction.

02

Bespoke Workshops

Kubi designs and delivers a custom brand workshop for your team — in-person or virtual. Tailored to your industry, challenges, and growth stage.

03

Executive Keynote

Kubi speaks at your conference, summit, or leadership offsite. A high-impact session that reframes how your organisation thinks about brand.
